title: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Everything you need to know about booking an airport transfer across Belgium.
description_secondary: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Contact our support team—we're happy to help.

items.question: How do I book an airport transfer in Belgium?
items.answer: You can book online through our website in just a few minutes. Enter your pickup and drop-off locations, choose your vehicle, and confirm your booking to receive instant confirmation.

items.question: Which Belgian airports do you serve?
items.answer: We provide transfers to and from all major Belgian airports, including Brussels (Zaventem), Brussels South Charleroi, Antwerp, Liège, and Ostend-Bruges.

items.question: Are your services available 24/7?
items.answer: Yes. We operate 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, including weekends and public holidays, so you can travel whenever you need.

items.question: Do you monitor flight delays?
items.answer: Yes. We track your flight in real time and automatically adjust your pickup time if your flight is delayed or arrives early—at no extra charge.

items.question: Can I book transfers outside major cities?
items.answer: Yes. In addition to Brussels, Antwerp, Charleroi, and Liège, we arrange door-to-door transfers to hotels, offices, and destinations across Belgium.

items.question: Are your prices fixed?
items.answer: Yes. You receive a clear fixed price when you book—no hidden fees or meter surprises. The fare is confirmed before you travel.
